message.content:
Read these reference files to understand existing patterns for comparison with the weekly summary implementation:

1. D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-server\app\Http\Controllers\Oa\DailyReportAiController.php - Read fully, focus on ai_analysis_config, inWhitelist, gz decompression patterns
2. D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-server\app\Http\Controllers\Oa\DailyReportController.php - Read lines 60-80 for authorized_token pattern, and the save/update methods
3. D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-server\app\Service\DailyReportService.php - Read lines 680-700 for saveReportDraft authorized_token, and lines 1300-1320 for getTokensByReportIds
4. D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-server\config\sfuser_apis\daily_report_ai.php - Read to compare route config pattern

Return key patterns and code snippets.
